semantic.role: Core TypeScript type definition module establishing the scanning policy configuration contract for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Defines the FileSource union type specifying permissible file origins for scanning (git-tracked, git-tracked-plus-untracked, filesystem).
Declares the ScanPolicy interface that structures the scanning configuration, including file source, ignore chain configuration, and protocol inclusion/exclusion lists.
Provides the PartialScanPolicy interface for optional policy updates, enabling partial configuration overrides.
outOfScope: Implementing scanning logic or pipeline execution.
Handling CLI command parsing or invocation.
Providing runtime validation or default values for policy fields.
invariants: Defines pure TypeScript types and interfaces without side effects.
Serves as a stable contract for core scanning pipeline configuration.
Maintains isolation from CLI entry points and implementation details.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: To provide a centralized, immutable type contract for scanning policies, ensuring configuration consistency across the pipeline.
